Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Malone for Gary Patterson.

Mr. Malone stated that he believes all of the Probate Examiner's questions have been answered, that he is not sure how Probate Code 11604 comes in, that the missing pages are attorney client privilege and that there is no conflict between the Heirship Company and the Heirs. The Petition to Determine Heirship was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)
